wizard.audience: Independent professionals and growing businesses, Small business owners, SaaS & startup founders, Solopreneurs & freelancers, Agencies & consultants, Marketing teams, Local service businesses, Operations managers, Coaches & course creators
wizard.services: They offer end-to-end AI implementation, including automation, business consulting, AI-powered SEO & GEO, lead generation systems, GHL CRM setup, and hands-on AI training.
wizard.description: AI Biz Connect helps independent professionals and growing businesses automate their operations, capture more leads, and scale revenue without hiring more people. They provide practical AI training and done-for-you GHL systems.

.logo-showcase-container{margin:0 auto;overflow:hidden;position:relative;width:100%}.logo-showcase-track{animation:scroll linear infinite;display:flex;width:-moz-max-content;width:max-content;will-change:transform}.logo-showcase-track.paused{animation-play-state:paused}.logo-showcase-content{align-items:center;display:flex;gap:20px;width:-moz-max-content;width:max-content}.logo-item{align-items:center;display:flex;flex-shrink:0;justify-content:center}.logo-item .logo-item-image img,.logo-item img{display:block;height:auto;max-width:100%;-o-object-fit:contain;object-fit:contain}@keyframes scroll{0%{transform:translate(0)}to{transform:translate(calc(-100%/var(--total-sets, 3)))}}
.social-icons-container{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;-webkit-font-smoothing:auto!important}.social-icon{color:inherit;cursor:pointer;display:block;padding:1rem;text-align:center;text-decoration:none}.social-icon p{margin-top:8px}
.testimonial-modal-overlay{align-items:center;background:#0000004d;display:flex;height:100vh;justify-content:center;left:0;position:fixed;top:0;width:100vw;z-index:10000}.testimonial-modal-content{align-items:stretch;background:none;display:flex;flex-direction:column;max-height:600px;max-width:540px;width:100%}.testimonial-modal-close{align-items:center;background:#fff;border:none;border-radius:50%;cursor:pointer;display:flex;height:36px;justify-content:center;position:absolute;right:20px;top:20px;transition:background .15s;width:36px;z-index:2}.testimonial-modal-close-icon{color:#222;height:22px;width:22px}@media(max-width:768px){.testimonial-modal-content{border-radius:10px;max-width:98vw}.testimonial-modal-close{right:10px;top:10px}}

Biz Connect</span><span style="color: var(--white)"> was built out of a simple observation: the tools that make large firms unstoppable -- automated pipelines, AI-powered follow-up, integrated client systems - were sitting right there, available to everyone, but nobody had packaged them for the independent professional who runs lean and doesn't have a tech team.</span></p><p><span style="color: var(--white)">We are not a software company. We are operators who built our own systems first, saw what worked, and turned that into a repeatable model for brokers, advisors, and consultants who are done trading time for money.</span></p><p><span style="color: var(--white)">Every service we offer, every workflow we build, and every lesson in our bootcamp comes from something we actually deployed in a real business - not a case study we read about.</span></p><p><span style="color: var(--white)">The mission has always been the same: give independent professionals the exact infrastructure that was designed for someone with a bigger budget, and make it work for the way you actually draft_sections.heading: Your Questions, Answered.
draft_sections.subheading: Find quick answers about ABC SalesMaster's all-in-one platform, designed to empower your business growth across law, finance, real estate, and more.

items.a: ABC SalesMaster is a comprehensive SaaS platform that integrates CRM, marketing automation, website building, and advanced analytics tools into a single, powerful solution. It's designed to streamline operations and accelerate growth for professionals and businesses across various industries.
items.q: What is ABC SalesMaster?

items.a: Our platform is built for a diverse range of professionals, including law firms, insurance agencies, investment advisors, real estate professionals, small business owners, SaaS startups, solopreneurs, local service businesses, marketing teams, agencies, consultants, coaches, and operations managers. If you manage client relationships, market your services, or need data-driven insights, ABC SalesMaster is for you.
items.q: Who can benefit most from ABC SalesMaster?

items.a: ABC SalesMaster provides an integrated suite of tools including a robust CRM for client management, powerful marketing automation for campaigns and lead nurturing, an intuitive website builder for your online presence, and comprehensive analytics to track performance and inform strategy.
items.q: What core features does ABC SalesMaster offer?

items.a: By centralizing your essential business functions, ABC SalesMaster helps you save time, reduce overhead, and improve efficiency. You can enhance client engagement, automate repetitive tasks, optimize your marketing efforts, and make informed decisions based on real-time data, all contributing to sustainable business growth.
items.q: How does ABC SalesMaster help my business grow?

items.a: Our platform is designed with user-friendliness in mind. We offer intuitive interfaces and resources to help you get started quickly. While any powerful tool requires some learning, our goal is to make the transition as smooth as possible, allowing you to focus on your business, not complex software.
items.q: Is ABC SalesMaster difficult to set up or use?

items.a: We are committed to your success. Our team provides comprehensive support to help you maximize the value of ABC SalesMaster. You can access our knowledge base, tutorials, and direct support channels for any questions or assistance you may need.
items.q: What kind of support is available?

items.a: Getting started is simple. Contact our sales team directly to discuss your specific needs and see a demonstration of how ABC SalesMaster can transform your business. We're ready to help you take the next step.
items.q: How do I get started with ABC SalesMaster?

draft_seo.description: Ottawa mortgages made simple.

children.text: Navigate the complex world of home financing with confidence. I help Ottawa families secure the best rates and terms tailored to their unique financial goals.
Whether you're stepping into your first home or expanding your investment portfolio, I provide the expertise you need.
Step-by-step guidance through the pre-approval and purchasing process for your first home.
Unlock equity for renovations or debt consolidation with expert refinancing advice.
Don't just sign with your current lender. Let's find you a better rate before you renew.
Strategic financing for rental properties to help grow your real estate portfolio.

"My goal is simple: to make your mortgage process as seamless and stress-free as possible. I live and work in Ottawa, and I care deeply about helping our community thrive through smart homeownership."
Years of navigating the Ottawa real estate market means I know the local nuances that matter.
In a hot market, timing is everything. I pride myself on rapid pre-approvals and clear communication.
You're not just a file number. Every mortgage plan I build is customized to your long-term wealth.
Transparency is my policy. If a deal isn't right for you, I'll be the first to tell you.
A streamlined three-step process designed for the digital age.
Complete a secure 10-minute application from your phone or computer.
I shop 30+ lenders to find your perfect match and secure your commitment.
Finalize your paperwork and celebrate your new home or lower rate.
"Marc made our first home purchase in Kanata seamless. He explained everything clearly and got us a rate much better than our bank."
"Refinancing for renovations felt overwhelming until we spoke to Marc. He found us the equity we needed with minimal hassle."
"As an investor, speed is crucial. Marc delivers every single time with competitive rates and professional advice."
I'm here to answer your questions and help you find the best solution for your situation. No pressure, just expert advice.
123 Elgin Street, Suite 400 Ottawa, ON K1P 5K6
